notableEvents.label: Zach McKinstry reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Luke Keaschall.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling pops out to first baseman Royce Lewis in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones flies out to center fielder Byron Buxton.

notableEvents.label: Wenceel Pérez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Wenceel Pérez singles on a line drive to right fielder Austin Martin.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling flies out sharply to center fielder Byron Buxton.

notableEvents.label: Brooks Lee GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee grounds into a double play, second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Byron Buxton out at 2nd. Brooks Lee out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Austin Martin plunked
notableEvents.detail: Austin Martin hit by pitch. Alex Jackson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Orlando Arcia GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Orlando Arcia grounds into a double play, third baseman Kevin McGonigle to second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Brooks Lee out at 2nd. Orlando Arcia out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Luke Keaschall.

notableEvents.label: Kody Clemens pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kody Clemens doubles (14) on a ground ball to right fielder Kerry Carpenter.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Drew Sommers. Brooks Lee scores. Josh Bell to 3rd. Royce Lewis to 2nd.
